title: 2024 Elevate London

posts.author: Juan (Juan Cisneros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

I’m Juan, from our Solutions Engineering team
We are presenting a top 10 tips talk at Elevate London and we would love to hear from you! What top tips would you share with the monday.com community? No wrong answer! I’ll make sure to share ours a bit later.

posts.author: Christoph (Christoph)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Juan , thanks for sharing your top 10 tips at Elevate. It was a great show!
You said you would share the templates in the community afterwards. Where can we find them?

posts.author: Juan (Juan Cisneros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Christoph!

Thanks for coming! Yes, we will be posting that end of week, we have our NYC presentation this week so just waiting till then. I’ll come back here in a few days and share the link to install

posts.author: Christoph (Christoph)
posts.cookedHtml: @Juan did you post it elsewhere? Otherwise, consider this a friendly reminder

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml: Following the thread as sounds exciting to get the tips and tricks thanks @Juan

posts.author: Juan (Juan Cisneros)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello again!
Thanks for you patience, we just had our Elevate in Australia last week so was waiting to post this but here is the install link:

auth.monday.com

Welcome to monday.com | a new way of working

monday.com Work OS is an open platform where anyone can create the tools they need to run every aspect of their work.

and a video of instructions here: Elevate Conference Tips Installation Guide | Loom
